raw_title: Book Review: ‘John of John,’ by Douglas Stuart
description: In the powerful and surprising “John of John,” Douglas Stuart sends a young art student back home to a family he thought he’d left behind.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Things We Never Say,’ by Elizabeth Strout
book_title: ‘The Things We Never Say,’ by Elizabeth Strout
description: “The Things We Never Say” leaves behind Crosby, Maine, for Massachusetts, where a middle-aged history teacher discovers a long-buried family secret.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Ghost Stories,’ by Siri Hustvedt
description: In a new book, Siri Hustvedt recalls her life with the writer Paul Auster and the story of his illness.
